title: vagstef's additions
description: additions i wanted to add to minecraft(with mcreator)
body:
So, this serverside mod is some stuff i wanted to add to minecraft with mcreator,
this is the list of whats in the mod as of the newest version
# **HEAVY WORK IS BEING DONE**(or so i want to believe maybe)

1.Cutlasses, baiscly better swords![Cutlasses](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b501c7c727c4ca8dbec43c1051fb356a3d874dc0.png)
2.knuckles. It's only use is for the sorcery enchantment basicly

![knuckles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73acfcd227904ec9e42a932140da80c36363ae2b.png)

3.New enchantments (Sorcery1,2)

 ![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7eb57e8b955e41c5d95d78224c46ee8a07bec6e3.png)
 ![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5952ce26784e906a1e426e2f1a000bc03389bd7b.png)
4.Iron shield(W.I.P)

Thats it for now.
For more info visit the wiki page
